# Klienta Public

Public trust and commercial policy satellite for Klienta.

- Repository: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta-public
- Klienta product page: https://byteworthy.io/boilerplates/klienta
- Boilerplates hub: https://byteworthy.io/boilerplates
- Services: https://byteworthy.io/services
- Contact: https://byteworthy.io/contact
- GitHub Pages mirror: https://byteworthyllc.github.io/klienta-public/

## Source Repositories
- Klienta: private commercial source (provisioned after purchase)
- Sovra: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra
- Clynova Public: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/clynova-public

## Public Trust Docs
- README: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta-public/blob/main/README.md
- Site mirror index: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta-public/blob/main/site/index.html
- Site mirror llms: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta-public/blob/main/site/llms.txt
- EULA: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta-public/blob/main/EULA.md
- Terms: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta-public/blob/main/TERMS.md
- Security: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta-public/blob/main/SECURITY.md
- Sales Flow: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta-public/blob/main/SALES-FLOW.md
